blocks.text: Suzuka Friday — Russell leads the F1 championship into Japan
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Japanese GP, Suzuka. Russell 51pts, Antonelli 47pts — four points split the top two.
Hovland limped to T90 at Valspar. A new week begins Thursday in Houston — Reitan and Ventura carry Norwegian colours at Memorial Park.

blocks.label: 🚴 Spring Classics — Norwegian brigade
items: Fri 11:52 — E3 Saxo Classic: Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard on the Flemish cobbles
Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem: Wærenskjold's power stage, Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard also in
